title: roles
description: manage roles and permissions for your organization
descriptionCreate: create a new role with specific permissions

info.title: What is a Role?
info.description: A Role defines a set of permissions that control what users can do in MapexOS. Roles implement role-based access control (RBAC) to secure your system and manage user capabilities across different resources and organizations.

permissions.title: Permission Management
permissions.text: Define granular permissions for resources like assets, users, data sources, and routing

systemCustom.title: System vs Custom Roles
systemCustom.text: Use built-in system roles or create custom roles tailored to your organization's needs

accessControl.title: Multi-Resource Access Control
accessControl.text: Control access across multiple resource types with a single role assignment

userAssignment.title: User Assignment
userAssignment.text: Assign roles to users to grant them specific permissions and capabilities

granular.title: Granular Permissions
granular.text: Fine-grained control with create, read, update, delete, and execute permissions

empty.title: no roles found
empty.description: it seems there are no roles matching your current search criteria or you don't have any roles yet.

messages.confirmDelete: are you sure you want to delete the role "{name}"?

notifications.sharedEdit: shared roles from other organizations cannot be edited
notifications.sharedDelete: shared roles from other organizations cannot be deleted

drawer.title: role details
drawer.systemRoleWarning: this is a system role and cannot be modified or deleted

stepDescriptions.basicInfo: set the role name, description, and scope
stepDescriptions.permissions: select the permissions for this role

formDescriptions.basicInfo: enter the basic details for this role
formDescriptions.permissions: select the resources and actions this role can access
formDescriptions.isTemplate: template roles can be shared with child organizations

validation.nameMinLength: role name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: role name must not exceed 100 characters
validation.permissionsRequired: please select at least one permission

messages.completeAllSteps: complete all steps to create the role
messages.systemRoleWarning: this is a system role. some fields cannot be modified.

reviewStep.subtitle: review your role configuration before saving
reviewStep.successMessage: ready to create! click 'create role' to save
reviewStep.successMessageEdit: ready to update! click 'update role' to save changes

notifications.noPermissions: please select at least one permission
notifications.alreadyExists: a role with this name already exists
notifications.forbidden: you do not have permission to perform this action
